title: ESCC data provenance record
description: Per-field / per-artifact source provenance (rules/common/data-handling.md): where a value came from, its lawful basis, and whether it derives from untrusted prospect content (prompt-defense I3). Attached to account-memory fields, /learn output, and durable intel.

source.description: origin label, e.g. hubspot | gmail | user | web:exa | instinct:evolved | manual

field.description: the field this record annotates (per-field provenance)

retrieved_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the value was captured

lawful_basis.description: GDPR lawful basis — see rules/common/lawful-basis.md (e.g. consent | legitimate_interest | contract)

untrusted.description: true if derived from untrusted prospect content (I3 prompt-defense) — never auto-acted upon
